subject: Green-skinned warrior performing a drilling finger-beam technique, intense energy spiral visible
description: A green-skinned figure with pointed ears and a distinctive physique is shown performing a signature technique involving two fingers extended toward the viewer. A spiraling, drilling energy beam of intense yellow-purple energy erupts from the fingertips and dominates the center of the frame. The figure's expression is one of fierce concentration. The background is rendered in explosive purples and yellows, with energy radiating outward from the point of impact. The technique is visually distinctive as a precision drilling beam rather than a broad energy wave.
foreground: Green-skinned figure extending two fingers, drilling energy spiral erupting forward
background: Explosive purple and yellow energy burst, radiant
emotion: fierce concentration, lethal precision, absolute resolve
